name: Rich Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the flour and confectioners' sugar; cut in margarine until crumbly.
3. Press mixture onto the bottom of a lightly greased 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, beat eggs and granulated sugar. Add baking powder, lemon juice, and remaining flour; mix well.
6. Pour batter over baked crust.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Cool completely.
9. Cut into bars.
10. Sprinkle with additional confectioners' sugar.
11. Store covered in the refrigerator.
Makes 24 to 36 bars.
